channel.title: swaywm on Sebastian Hoß
channel.description: Recent content in swaywm on Sebastian Hoß

item.title: Lock your screen on SwayWM
item.description: SwayWM uses can use a mixture of swaylock to lock their screen. Place the following key binding in your Sway config: # # Screen lock # bindsym $mod+Ctrl+l exec swaylock -c 000000 $mod+Ctrl+l will lock your screen and turn it to black.

item.title: Taken screenshots on SwayWM
item.description: SwayWM uses can use a mixture of grim and slurp to take screenshots of their desktop. Place the following key binding in your Sway config: # take screenshot of currently focused screen bindsym $mod+Print exec /usr/bin/grim -o $(swaymsg -t get_outputs | jq -r '.[] | select(.focused) | .name') $(xdg-user-dir PICTURES)/$(date +'%Y-%m-%d-%H%M%S.png') # take screenshot of selection bindsym $mod+Shift+p exec /usr/bin/grim -g "$(/usr/bin/slurp)" $(xdg-user-dir PICTURES)/$(date +'%Y-%m-%d-%H%M%S.png')
